question: I'm going back to our previous chat about the Lost Temple of the Djinn one-shot. Can you remind me how many mummies the party will face in the temple?

runs.response_text: In the "Lost Temple of the Djinn" one-shot, the party is expected to face a group of mummies guarding the temple. While the exact number can vary depending on the Dungeon Master's discretion and the party's actions, a typical encounter might involve **4 to 6 mummies**. This number provides a challenging but manageable battle, allowing for exciting combat while ensuring the party has a fair chance to succeed.
The party will face 4 mummies in the temple as part of the enemies encountered during the one-shot "The Lost Temple of the Djinn."
In the Lost Temple of the Djinn one-shot, the party will face 4 mummies.
The party will face 4 mummies in the temple.
